raw_text: The project standardises on a single build tool for all environment management.
note: claude_memory deterministic path: no route_overrides -> classifier -> origin=agent_inferred. The hook overlays user_validated for type:user/feedback via a route_overrides field, which is replay-tested separately (#265).

raw_text: Prefer small atomic commits over large batched ones when landing changes.
note: claude_memory; declarative fact, no skip path.

raw_text: The current release line ships from a tagged commit on the default branch.
The status dashboard for the pipeline lives behind the internal metrics portal.
Background tasks are scheduled through a single cron-style entry point.
The cache layer is keyed by a deterministic content hash of each entry.
